name_cn:
💰Sade hobo_Shoulder/Crossbody Bag
Imported Italian lambskin material, super soft and smooth. This versatile handbag features a folded top handle and a detachable shoulder strap for multiple carrying options. Comes with a fine long chain. A small bag that fits a phone perfectly, can be carried by hand or crossbody. So exquisite!
